name: wasmtime
description: Rust-side host embedding of the wasmtime WebAssembly runtime. Covers the Engine/Store/Linker/Component lifecycle, the bindgen! macro for WIT-generated host bindings, WASI capability grants (clocks, fs, net, stdio, env, args), `&self` ergonomics via Arc<Mutex<...>>, hot-swap patterns, error handling and trap diagnosis, AOT precompilation (serialize/deserialize), async support (Config::async_support), and debug surfaces (core dumps, backtraces, fuel metering, epoch interruption). Companion to the webassembly skill (language-agnostic WIT/component/WASI) and the rust skill (idioms, cargo, rustc). Context7-grounded against /bytecodealliance/wasmtime and docs.rs.
